goals: Store initial work-related preferences and communication style
Search for stored preferences to verify retrieval
Review all stored memories to see current context
Clean up outdated or unnecessary memories

user_agent_config.personality: Direct and efficiency-focused. Prefers concise, actionable information over verbose explanations. Values precision in communication.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands memory management concepts but does not know internal tool names or APIs. Expects simple, practical functionality.

end_condition: The user has stored their preferences, verified they can be retrieved, reviewed all stored context, and cleaned up any unwanted memories.
